message:
feat(demo_showcase): enhance Jobs page with detailed info pane

Add comprehensive details pane to Jobs page including:
- Summary section: Kind, Progress, Duration, Error (if failed)
- Parameters section: Environment, Target, Actor, Priority
- Timeline section: Visual progress Created → Started → Completed
- Logs section: Last 5 job-correlated log entries with LogStream

Implements bd-3m25.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
